summary: Completed testing of admin login redirect fix for TLS Advocate Management System. Admin login redirect issue has been successfully resolved. All core functionality working with one minor UI enhancement needed.

ui_bugs.issue: Manage buttons on advocates list don't open clear management interface (modal/form)
ui_bugs.details: Manage buttons are present and clickable but don't open status management modal or form. May need implementation of status change interface.

passed_tests: Admin can access advocates management page
Advocates list displays with search and filter
action_item_for_main_agent: Implement advocate status management interface. The manage buttons exist but need to open a modal or form to allow admins to change advocate status (Active/Suspended/Inactive).
